creator: koma2@lovepeers.org
text:
Fix the VuXML entries of recently discovered tdiary vulnerabilities
("fefd93d8-8af5-11db-9d01-0016179b2dd5" and "666b8c9e-8212-11db-851e-0016179b2dd5")
as follows:

- correct the affected version numbers
- package name of www/tdiary-devel is "tdiary-devel", not "tdiary"
- add ja-tdiary and ja-tdiary-devel to affected packages

Fix: Patch attached with submission follows:
